use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS applications to showcase product value proposition
Portfolio or agency website hero with professional dark/light theme switching
Marketing page header with background imagery and gradient overlays
Product launch pages with animated visual effects and theme customization
Creative portfolio showcase sections with minimal aesthetic
ai_summary: A sophisticated minimal hero section component featuring automatic and manual dark/light theme switching, background imagery with gradient overlays, and glass-morphism styling. Built with React hooks for state management and includes custom CSS animations. Designed as a versatile landing page header suitable for SaaS, portfolio, and creative agency websites with responsive platform support.
